name: DOUBLE_HIGH_EXPRESSION_TARGETPAIRS_BY_CANCER
description: Double high expression target pairs by cancer. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t1:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c:Cancer {name: $cancer})
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t2:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c)
WHERE t1 <> t2
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, collect(DISTINCT t1.symbol) + collect(DISTINCT t2.symbol) AS targets
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Which target pairs contain two targets that are both highly expressed in LUAD?
Which target pairs contain two targets that are both highly expressed in LUSC?
Which target pairs contain two targets that are both highly expressed in STAD?
